title: INFORMATION AND REFERRAL - 211info
text: EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO INFORMATION AND REFERRAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and referral to community resources for community members requiring assistance with accessing resources. 333 SE 223rd Avenue Suite 100 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Community members who identify as Hispanic or Latinx Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-4:30pm Email (503) 669-8350 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 669-8350 Main phone (503) 232-4448 Hotline UNICA Crisis Line/Linea de Crisis UNICA Main phone (503) 669-8350 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community Language Translation * Hispanic/Latino Community Specialized Information and Referral * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD JUSTICE HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY RENT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - EVICTION PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - HOME FINDER SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH AND FAMILY EDUCATION ENGAGEMENT PREK-12 LEGAL SERVICES - FAIR HOUSING ENFORCEMENT COLLABORATIVE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - UNICA UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO
